mapper.select: SELECT e.id, e.order_id as orderId, e.evaluator_id as evaluatorId, e.target_id as targetId, e.score, e.content as comment, e.create_time as createTime, '' as evaluatorName, '' as evaluatorAvatar, '' as targetName, '' as targetAvatar, '' as productTitle, '' as productImage, '' as orderNo FROM t_evaluation e WHERE e.target_id = #{userId} ORDER BY e.create_time DESC

SELECT e.id, e.order_id as orderId, e.evaluator_id as evaluatorId, e.target_id as targetId, e.score, e.content as comment, e.create_time as createTime, '' as evaluatorName, '' as evaluatorAvatar, '' as targetName, '' as targetAvatar, '' as productTitle, '' as productImage, '' as orderNo FROM t_evaluation e WHERE e.evaluator_id = #{userId} ORDER BY e.create_time DESC
